vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on Backup shadow File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/shadow-, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0000 /etc/shadow-

triage_decision.reason: The remediation only changes the file permissions of the backup shadow file (/etc/shadow-). This is a standard STIG requirement and does not affect active authentication mechanisms or system boot. The change is low risk and unlikely to cause lockout or service interruption.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Reduced visibility of backup shadow file for troubleshooting; Potential impact on custom scripts that read /etc/shadow-
